rulings.Case Title: NANCY MGGINNIS VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 07, 2020 line 2. Plaintiff'S Request For Preliminary Injunction is continued to December 14, 2020. By no later than December 8, 2020 Plaintiff to provide a copy of the operative contract requiring the lender to provide periodic monthly bills/conditioning borrower's payment on receipt of the periodic monthly bill. The relevant contract clause shall be highlighted and tabbed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIKHAEL OGANESIAN VS. RICHARD LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 07, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT RICHARD LEE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Defendant failed to show that he is entitled to a Summary Judgment as a matter of law. The notice and complaint describe the premises with reasonable specificity. CCP 1166(a)(3) given the undisputed roommate situation. =(501/REQ)
